meta.name: Sigil Core — Reverse / Bind Shells
meta.author: NOMARJ <hello@sigilsec.ai>
meta.description: Detects reverse and bind shell command payloads across shells and languages (interactive C2 establishment). Generated from reverse-shell-generator (https://github.com/0dayCTF/reverse-shell-generator@main 9fda27f91b1b, retrieved 2026-06-22, MIT (see upstream LICENSE)).
